content.en:
【Extreme Ancestor: Yin and Yang】

"It turned out to be the Yin and Yang Pole Dao Ancestral Fu, containing the Yin Pole Dao and the Yang Pole Dao, a very good Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the other party's Yin and Yang Pole Dao Ancestral Fu.

And by copying the talent, Ye Tian also knew the identity of the other party - the Yin Yang Demon Lord!

This is the Black and White Bear of the Extreme Dao Creature, the cultivation of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, and his reputation in the Extreme Deep Sea is not obvious, at least not as famous as those who are famous in the Perfect Controller of the True Realm.

It's like the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, who has a good relationship with Ye Tian, and he is quite famous.

However, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix does not have the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, but this Yin Yang Demon Lord has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment.

"The Yin Yang Demon Lord has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, what a demonic talent he is, his strength must be very strong, it seems that this guy is very low-key, so other Extreme Dao creatures don't know his true strength. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, this is also normal, many extreme creatures don't like to fight very much, and the Yin Yang Demon Lord is like this, so the battle record is very small, and other extreme creatures naturally don't know the strength of the Yin Yang Demon Lord.

This kind of guy who is good at hiding his strength will live for a long time and will not fall easily.

Ye Tian didn't continue to observe the Yin Yang Demon Lord, otherwise it would be easy for him to sense.

It won't be long before the sale begins.

"It's a pity that I found such an Extreme Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If there are a few more Extreme Dao Ancestors, then he will make a lot of money!

Soon, the lord of Razor Mountain, the lord of Razor, appeared.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space distorted, and a very old body walked out, covered in white hair, and even a white ape, with a terrifying white thunder in its hair.

And this white thunder mang contains the Thunder Extreme Dao of the Perfection Realm, but the Thunder Extreme Dao contains a rotten aura, and it is obvious that the origin of the Extreme Dao has been eroded.

Now.

Although the Lord of Razor is still very powerful, all the Extreme Dao creatures can see that his aura is constantly decaying, and the Extreme Dao Origin is about to collapse.

This kind of injury is almost impossible to recover, even the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace has no choice.

Otherwise, the Lord of Razor would not have given up directly.

"I've seen the Lord of Razor!"

"I've seen the Lord of Razor!"

"I've seen the Lord of Razor!"

A group of extreme creatures said politely.

Although the Lord of Razor is dead, as long as he is not dead, his deterrent power will still exist.

And the Lord of Razor, who is about to die, who dares to offend, otherwise the other party will die with him, and it will be over.

Therefore, the Lord of Razor at this time is the most terrifying time.

The Lord of Razor looked around, saw a large number of Extreme Dao creatures, and said, "Everyone, this time I will sell all the treasures on my body, and only accept the transaction of Extreme Dao Coins, not bartering!"

"I'll wait until I understand, Lord of Razor should start quickly!"

A true realm perfect controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, said.

"Good!"

The Lord of Razor nodded slightly, and immediately took out one treasure after another, and began to sell at the same time, whoever offered the highest price could buy it, but he had to deliver the Extreme Dao Coins on the spot.

Ye Tian has a lot of Extreme Dao Coins, after all, he can condense thousands of Extreme Dao Coins, and almost all these years have been condensing Extreme Dao Coins, so he has a large number of Extreme Dao Coins.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not compete for the kind of treasure that was enough for the perfect controller of the True Realm to snatch, otherwise he would be targeted by many perfect controllers of the True Realm, which would not be good.

After all, his current identity as a Void Sparrow already has a certain reputation, and if he abandons this identity, re-replicates an Extreme Path Creature body, and has to re-develop the relationship, it will be a waste of time and an increase in risk.

So, he didn't want to be in trouble.

Ye Tian didn't compete for too many things, except for buying some treasures that would help him cultivate.

Time passed slowly, countless treasures were sold, and the grade of the treasures behind was getting higher and higher.

After a long time, the Lord of Razor finally took out the Thunder Pole Dao Monument.

When the Thunder Pole Dao Monument appeared, a group of people who perfectly controlled the True Realm showed interest.

"Thunder Pole Dao Monument, 10 million Pole Dao coins start, whoever bids high will be whoever!"

The Lord of Razor said with some reluctance.

After all, he was able to rise, and the Thunder Pole Dao Monument helped a lot.

But now that he is about to fall, his bloodline descendants will definitely not be able to keep the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, so he must sell it.

Exchanging the Thunder Pole Monument for Pole Dao Coins was indeed the stupidest deal, but he had to do it.

Soon, a group of Reality Perfect Masters began to bid.

In the end, the Yin Yang Demon Lord bid 160 million Extreme Dao Coins to buy this Thunder Extreme Dao Monument.

160 million Extreme Dao Coins seems like a lot, but those who have cultivated for countless years of True Realm Perfect Controls have a lot of Extreme Dao Coins stored, so they can only take it out.

For them, the Extreme Dao Currency is of little use, where can it compare to the Thunder Extreme Dao Monument!

Soon, one Extreme Dao Treasure after another was sold, and even two Extreme Dao Treasures were taken out.

"I didn't expect the Lord of Razor to have two Extreme Treasures!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

A perfect controller of the Extreme Realm like the Lord of the Ancients, I'm afraid he doesn't have two Extreme Treasures.

I have to say that the creatures of the Extreme Deep Sea are really rich!

"I'm going to sell the last treasure next. "

The Lord of Razor said.

Immediately, he took out a gray stone.

When this gray stone appeared, the surrounding space was frozen, and even the power of the Spatial Pole seemed to be suppressed by it.

"It's ......"

All the Extreme Dao creatures can see that this treasure is not simple.

"It's the original empty golden stone!"

The Yin Yang Demon Lord was surprised.

As soon as they heard the Primordial Void Golden Stone, some of the Extreme Dao creatures were taken aback.

"The Primordial Void Golden Stone that contains the power of the Extreme Space Extreme Dao, this thing is useful to many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, I didn't expect you to have one, Lord of Razor. A Realm Perfect Controller said.

The Lord of Razor smiled bitterly: "I actually suffered such an injury in order to snatch this Primordial Void Golden Stone, although I killed the enemy, my own Extreme Dao Origin was almost destroyed. If I had been given another chance, I wouldn't have snatched this Primordial Void Stone again. "

"The value of the Primordial Void Golden Stone is very high, comparable to the value of a hundred Extreme Miscanthus White Grasses, and there are a lot of extreme space poles contained in it. Moreover, the Spatial Extreme Dao is very powerful, and many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have also cultivated the Spatial Extreme Dao, if you dedicate it to a certain great person of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, you don't need to sell your own treasures, and you can even find a backer for your bloodline descendants. The Yin Yang Demon Lord said.

The Lord of Razor shook his head slightly, "I don't believe in the promise of the Extreme Dao Creature, even if it is the promise of the great man of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, I can't believe it, if I fall, how will I know what will happen in the future? At the very least, the rules of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall are very strict, and they will not pit my bloodline descendants. "

"That's just as well!"

The Yin Yang Demon Lord agreed.

"Bid, everybody!"

The Lord of Razor said.
